words.def: pleasant or pleasing or agreeable in nature or appearance; - George Meredith
words.zh: 最美好的, 最令人愉快的（nice的最高階）

words.def: the piece of land on which something is located (or is to be located)
words.zh: n. 位置, 場所, 地點

words.def: a city in southeastern France on the Mediterranean; the leading resort on the French Riviera
words.zh: a. 美好的, 和藹的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 細微的, 挑剔的, 謹慎的

words.def: a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used
words.zh: n. 日落, 同夥, 組合, 集合, 裝置

words.def: the branch of engineering that deals with the use of computers and telecommunications to retrieve and store and transmit information
